title: Billing
connectPrompt: Connect an OpenYak account to purchase credits and access premium models.
freeQuotaDesc: Free models available to all accounts. Resets every Friday at 12:00 UTC.
buyCreditsDesc: Credits unlock premium models like Claude, GPT-4, and more.
noTransactions: No transactions yet. Purchase credits to get started.
quotaExceededDesc: You've used your weekly free token quota. It resets every Friday at 12:00 UTC. Upgrade to credits for unlimited access to premium models like Claude, GPT-4, and more.
creditsRequiredDesc: This model requires credits. Purchase a credit pack to unlock premium models.
